_comment: Epic #3126 AC2 / G5: settings-driven fleet host list. No hardcoded IP in code. Override with MEGINGJORD_FLEET_HOSTS (JSON array) or FLEET_HOSTS_PATH. Absent/malformed config degrades to an empty list -> callers fall back per G6.

hosts.notes: Primary. Ollama serializes per host -> max_concurrency 1 (AC2 sequential scheduling).
Secondary. Sole source of non-Qwen local families (deepseek, granite) -> required for local cross-family diversity.
